search_manifest.seed_order: 1-byte seeds first, then 2-byte seeds, each bucket big-endian
search_manifest.match_rule: generated seed prefixes are compared directly against reversible numeric value-channel bytes
search_manifest.metadata_policy: gaps, token widths, signs, decimal formatting sidecars, and channel descriptors are charged before promotion
search_manifest.scope: numeric value-channel research artifact only; not .tlmr format support

channels.name: integer-be64-stream
channels.description: Parse signed decimal integer tokens and emit fixed 8-byte big-endian signed values.

channels.name: integer-zigzag-varint-stream
channels.description: Parse signed decimal integer tokens and emit zigzag-varint values.

channels.name: integer-delta-varint-stream
channels.description: Emit zigzag-varint deltas between consecutive parsed integer values.

channels.name: record-field-delta-varint-stream
channels.description: Emit zigzag-varint deltas against the previous record's value at the same numeric field position.

channels.name: digit-residual-stream
channels.description: Emit digit residuals modulo 10 by token position while sidecar metadata carries token widths and signs.

channels.name: decimal-mantissa-exp-varint-stream
channels.description: Parse decimal/scientific numeric tokens into signed mantissa and base-10 exponent varints.

summary.conclusion: Numeric value channels did not produce prefix>=5, exact, selected, or metadata-profitable rows.
